name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
features: Manual entry for invoice and purchase order data

locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders
must_have_features: Manual entry for invoice and purchase order data

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
